records.ety: [L., let it be done, 3d pers. sing., subj. pres., fr. fieri, used as pass. of facere to make. Cf. Be.]

defs: An authoritative command or order to do something; an effectual decree.
quotes: His fiat laid the corner stone.

defs: A warrant of a judge for certain processes.
An authority for certain proceedings given by the Lord Chancellor's signature.
